title: Iteration Protocols, Generators, and Lazy Evaluation · Evaluation Trace: Iteration Protocol
summary: Process records larger than memory while exposing malformed rows at a controlled boundary. Planned artifact: Add and verify the fp iteration protocol increment in a bounded-memory lazy ingestion pipeline. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace iter, next, StopIteration, and single-pass iterator state exactly.
Combine adjacent transformations only when semantics, readability, and failure evidence remain intact.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
